events.title: React & Modern Frontend Meetup
events.description: A casual evening for frontend engineers. We'll cover React 19 features, new compiler internals, and live demos of component patterns. Bring a laptop if you want to follow along.

events.title: UX Design Sprint Workshop
events.description: A full-day hands-on workshop walking through the Google Ventures design sprint methodology. Teams will tackle a real product challenge from problem framing to prototype in one day.

events.title: Node.js & API Architecture Talk
events.description: Deep dive into building scalable REST and GraphQL APIs with Node.js. Topics include middleware design, auth patterns, rate limiting, and deployment on Railway.

events.title: Open Source Contribution Day
events.description: Spend the day contributing to open source projects. Maintainers of popular JS/TS libraries will be on hand to guide first-time contributors through the PR process.
